findings.message: New compose interpolation `${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}` is added to base.yml but `APP_WIDGET_API_URL` is not declared anywhere in `.env.example` (and is not consumed by any APP_ field in src/demo/config/settings.py). An undeclared interpolation resolves to an empty string with no documentation, so the variable is silently absent — a parity gap in the environment surface.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_API_URL=` to the framework-managed block of `.env.example` (alongside the other APP_ vars) so the variable is declared and documented for every environment that consumes this overlay.
